auth.loginDescription: Sign in to access the admin panel

connections.title: Connections
connections.name: Name
connections.deleteConfirm: Delete this connection? Encrypted keys will also be removed.
connections.grantHint: If tables are missing, check GRANT on the target database

bootstrap.title: Target setup
bootstrap.description: Install SupaAdmin helper functions on the Target Supabase project once. Run the SQL in the SQL Editor, then click Verify.
bootstrap.blockedDescription: Connection "{name}" is not set up yet. Login and CRUD are unavailable.
bootstrap.contactAdmin: Ask a platform administrator to complete Target setup.
bootstrap.securityNote: exec_sql runs arbitrary SQL as SECURITY DEFINER. Only service_role may EXECUTE it. Never expose the Service Role Key in client code or logs.

onboarding.title: Connection onboarding
onboarding.description: Complete these steps for "{name}" before using CRUD.
onboarding.checklistHint: Finish every step so Target login and permissions work without the Supabase Dashboard.
onboarding.stepBootstrap: Install Target bootstrap (exec_sql, permissions helper, GRANT)
onboarding.stepRoles: Configure role permissions and sync RLS
onboarding.stepProvision: Invite users and provision Target accounts
onboarding.stepConnect: Connect to Target (syncs JWT permissions on login)

connect.title: Connect to target
connect.description: Enter credentials for the target Supabase project
connect.syncFailed: Failed to sync permissions to Target
connect.provisionRequired: Target user not provisioned. Ask a platform admin to provision your account.
connect.emailMismatch: Email does not match the provisioned Target account

rolesPage.rlsSyncFailed: Permissions saved, but RLS sync to Target failed: {error}
rolesPage.rlsSyncRetry: Use Sync RLS on the Connections page to retry

rls.warning: Existing SupaAdmin policies may be overwritten

errors.permissionDenied: You do not have permission for this operation
